Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Zing shopping list app

Expo + TypeScript + Firebase project with feature-based architecture:
- Auth: login/register screens, Firebase Auth + Firestore profiles
- Shopping lists: CRUD service, real-time subscriptions, categorized items
- Pixel UI system: PixelButton, PixelInput, PixelCheckbox, PixelCard
- Navigation: protected routing \(auth/main stacks\)
- Docs: product spec, data model, security, UI system, Claude skills

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
